parser_claim: A Cantonese directional or deictic motion predicate may be followed by an overt locative goal.
source_proposition: Directional morphemes can head motion expressions and take a following locative object; attested examples include 去 with a destination and 走去 with a person/place goal.
implementation_effect: Permit the bounded motion-predicate plus overt-goal profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every directional morpheme, noun, or sequence has identical syntax or productivity.

parser_claim: A Cantonese directional or deictic motion predicate may be followed by an overt locative goal.
source_proposition: The thesis gives 去咗圖書館, 返咗屋企, and 到咗學校 with overt goals.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the three runtime predicate profiles 去, 返, and 到 when a visible goal follows.
forbidden_inference: Examples in an aspect thesis do not establish an exhaustive motion-verb class or the Canto Span label.

parser_claim: Perfective 咗 may follow 去, 返, or 到 and precede an overt locative goal.
source_proposition: The three cited motion examples place 咗 immediately after the motion predicate and before the destination expression.
implementation_effect: Permit the reviewed V-咗-goal order without moving or hiding the goal.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize the order to every aspect marker, directional complement, or motion predicate.

parser_claim: 返學 and 返工 are lexicalized go-to-school/go-to-work expressions rather than obligatorily literal RETURN plus an omitted place noun.
exact_locator: PDF pp. 207-208; printed pp. 189-190 and footnote
source_proposition: The monograph treats 返工, 返學, and 返屋企 as special iterated or lexicalized expressions and notes the normal go-to-work/go-to-school readings.
implementation_effect: Keep the overt 學 or 工 token as the conventional destination/domain; do not insert 學校 or 工作.
forbidden_inference: Do not assume every 返 plus noun sequence is lexicalized or that 返 never means return.

parser_claim: Arrival 到 as a main motion predicate must remain distinct from 到 used after another directional element or with a nonspatial result.
source_proposition: 到 can denote arrival at a locative goal and can also function as a directional/result element; physical and nonspatial goal uses are distinguished.
implementation_effect: Keep 到咗學校 in the arrival profile while routing spatial V-到-goal and nonspatial V-到-result through separate boundaries.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse all strings containing 到 into MotionGoalVP.

parser_claim: Arrival 到 as a main motion predicate must remain distinct from 到 used after another directional element or with a nonspatial result.
source_proposition: The appendix notes idiosyncratic behavior for 到 and illustrates it after other directional material as well as in goal-reaching expressions.
implementation_effect: Require the main-predicate profile to be distinguished from directional-complement profiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not use one 到 example to settle the category or parse of every 到 sequence.

parser_claim: The parser preserves the overt motion predicate and goal and inserts no hidden destination noun.
exact_locator: main.js baseline hash faca83136a654342fc2930ef4628fcd5bb4d847e77ba01a00be35fd8bbae0196; CP021B-R2 matrix claims MGV-C01-C04
source_proposition: The sources support visible predicates, goals, and a lexicalized 返學 boundary; they do not require covert nodes in the reviewed examples.
implementation_effect: Retain a transparent overt-token representation pending implementation review.
forbidden_inference: No cited source prescribes Canto Span's hidden-node policy or validates the internal name MotionGoalVP.

parser_claim: Physical motion uses of 去 must remain distinct from purposive-marker and abstract/non-displacement uses.
exact_locator: accepted manuscript pp. 39-41 and appendix p. 60
source_proposition: The study separates spatial-displacement expressions from marked purposive 去/嚟 and discusses physical versus abstract uses.
implementation_effect: Require an overt place-compatible goal for the reviewed MotionGoalVP profile and route purposive uses separately.
forbidden_inference: Do not tag every occurrence of 去 as a physical motion construction.

parser_claim: A Cantonese source phrase headed by 由 precedes the motion predicate and identifies the starting point.
source_proposition: The reference grammar describes 由 as marking a starting point and places the source expression before the verb.
implementation_effect: Permit overt 由-source before a reviewed motion predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 由 alone guarantees a motion clause or that every source phrase has the same internal category.

parser_claim: A Cantonese source phrase headed by 由 precedes the motion predicate and identifies the starting point.
source_proposition: The coverb inventory includes 由 for source, and the described coverb phrase precedes the main verb.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the surface-order guard while keeping the runtime label category-neutral.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the unpublished paper's syntactic analysis as settled or sufficient by itself.

parser_claim: A source-motion expression may contain both an overt source and an overt destination.
source_proposition: The study includes a motion expression with 由香港 as source and 台灣 as the later destination.
implementation_effect: Preserve both visible endpoints when the structural profile matches.
forbidden_inference: One corpus example does not establish unrestricted optional subjects, time phrases, predicates, or place nouns.

parser_claim: A source-motion expression may contain both an overt source and an overt destination.
source_proposition: The reference grammar gives source-to-goal movement examples, including from Taiwan to Hong Kong and from here to Sydney.
implementation_effect: Corroborate an overt source plus motion plus goal profile.
forbidden_inference: Descriptive examples do not justify arbitrary material between source, predicate, and goal.

parser_claim: The parser preserves the overt source, predicate, and goal and inserts no hidden locations.
source_proposition: The source evidence identifies visible source and destination expressions but does not posit the project's representation.
implementation_effect: Keep the representation overt-token anchored.
forbidden_inference: Do not present the no-hidden-location policy or the name SourceMotionClause as a published Cantonese analysis.

parser_claim: A purpose VP may immediately follow a Cantonese directional-motion expression.
source_proposition: The study defines a motion-cum-purpose pattern and illustrates a motion expression followed by 讀書 as its purpose.
implementation_effect: Permit a bounded motion expression plus immediately following purpose-VP candidate.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a purpose relation for arbitrary adjacent predicates.

parser_claim: Immediate following is a required boundary for the cited motion-cum-purpose coding, and marked purposive 去/嚟 is a separate case.
exact_locator: accepted manuscript pp. 26-28 and appendix p. 60
source_proposition: A purpose phrase was coded only when it immediately followed the motion clause; purposive-marker uses of 去/嚟 were treated separately.
implementation_effect: Require adjacency in the research-backed candidate and keep marked purposive uses out of the same profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not interpret the study's annotation criterion as a universal syntactic test or ignore meaning.

parser_claim: Subject sharing is compatible with Cantonese serial-verb analysis, but subject sharing and adjacency do not settle whether a sequence is purpose, complementation, compounding, or coordination.
source_proposition: The chapter treats subject sharing as a general serial-verb characteristic while showing that purpose-infinitive and other constructional analyses may compete or remain indeterminate.
implementation_effect: Use shared overt subject as a representation property only after the purpose-chain profile is otherwise matched.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert every shared-subject verb sequence into MotionPurposeChain or claim SERIAL VERB as settled.

parser_claim: The parser may record one overt shared subject for a matched motion-purpose chain but must not insert a second hidden subject.
source_proposition: Research supports immediate motion-plus-purpose ordering and subject sharing as a possible property, not Canto Span's exact node policy.
implementation_effect: Preserve visible event order and overt subject provenance in later implementation review.
forbidden_inference: No source prescribes the project's hidden-argument representation.

parser_claim: Surface adjacency alone is insufficient to distinguish a purpose chain from coordination or another multi-verb construction.
source_proposition: The chapter explicitly compares alternative analyses and defines serial constructions more narrowly than a sequence containing two verbs.
implementation_effect: Require a motion-to-goal expression plus a semantically compatible following action, and keep uncertain cases review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim a deterministic purpose reading from word order alone.

parser_claim: 向 plus a direction or orientation may precede a motion predicate such as 行.
source_proposition: The reference grammar describes 向 as movement toward a point or direction and gives a 向...行 example.
implementation_effect: Permit a bounded 向-orientation before reviewed motion predicates.
forbidden_inference: Do not equate orientation with an attained endpoint or with a route extending through space.

parser_claim: 向 plus a direction or orientation may precede a motion predicate such as 行.
source_proposition: The paper lists 向 as a directional coverb and places coverb phrases before the main verb.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the surface order while leaving category and semantics theory-neutral.
forbidden_inference: Do not use an unpublished analysis as sole evidence or expand 向 to every noun and verb.

parser_claim: Direction/orientation introduced by 向 is not the same relation as route/via introduced by 經 or a reached goal.
source_proposition: The reference grammar assigns distinct functions to 向 toward and 經 via, and treats goal and source separately.
implementation_effect: Keep direction, route, source, and attained goal as distinct parser relations.
forbidden_inference: Do not use PathPhrase as if all spatial relations were interchangeable.

parser_claim: The current 沿住 plus route subtype lacks a verified research-grade construction analysis in the CP021B-R2 source set.
exact_locator: main.js accepted baseline runtime branch for PathPhrase; CP021B-R2 source search log
source_proposition: Current sources support 向 direction and distinguish 經 route, but they do not directly analyze the exact 沿住 route profile used by the parser.
implementation_effect: Keep the 沿住 subtype quarantined from research-backed promotion until a direct source is mapped.
forbidden_inference: Do not cite lexical or pedagogical attestation of 沿住 as validation of the current span, category, or productivity.

parser_claim: PathPhrase currently conflates at least 向 direction/orientation and 沿住 route subtypes and therefore requires narrowing or splitting before promotion.
source_proposition: The mapped sources support only the 向 subtype and explicitly distinguish spatial relation types.
implementation_effect: Retain the label only as an internal umbrella pending a future split; do not promote the whole label.
forbidden_inference: No source validates PathPhrase as standard terminology or as one homogeneous Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: Preverbal 喺 plus a place can locate the event or action expressed by the following predicate.
source_proposition: The article identifies preverbal locative-PP plus verb as the dominant order and contrasts event location with postverbal result location.
implementation_effect: Permit the bounded preverbal 喺-place event-location profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the same semantic role for every pre- or postverbal 喺 phrase.

parser_claim: Preverbal 喺 plus a place can locate the event or action expressed by the following predicate.
source_proposition: The reference grammar gives subject plus 喺-place plus activity examples.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the preverbal event-location subtype.
forbidden_inference: Teaching examples do not establish a complete predicate inventory or frequency.

parser_claim: Postverbal 喺 plus a place may express the result location of an affected participant rather than the location of the event.
source_proposition: The article contrasts preverbal action location with postverbal resulting location and rejects the postverbal order for the same static-event reading in a cited example.
implementation_effect: Keep postverbal result-location distinct from the preverbal event-location subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse both orders into one undifferentiated locative role.

parser_claim: Subject plus 喺 plus place may form a locative predicate without an additional action verb.
source_proposition: The reference grammar gives subject-led clauses in which 喺-place expresses where the subject is.
implementation_effect: Permit a bounded subject plus locative-predicate analysis for examples such as 我喺屋企.
forbidden_inference: Do not force every subject-plus-喺 sequence into a bare phrase or an event-location analysis.

parser_claim: Cantonese place expressions may contain a noun followed by a localizer such as 上面.
source_proposition: The localizer section describes noun-localizer order and gives spatial examples involving an object and tabletop location.
implementation_effect: Permit the bounded nominal-plus-localizer subtype while preserving both overt parts.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a localizer phrase as identical to a 喺 coverb phrase or locative predicate.

parser_claim: 喺度 has a location/presence use and a progressive use that must be distinguished by constructional context.
source_proposition: The reference grammar explicitly notes both locative and progressive functions for 喺度.
implementation_effect: Use predicate position and surrounding material to keep locative 喺度 separate from progressive marking.
forbidden_inference: Do not label every 喺度 token locative or every 喺度 token progressive.

parser_claim: The current postnominal presentational coda subtype exemplified by 有個人喺門口 is not directly mapped to a research analysis in the CP021B-R2 source set.
exact_locator: accepted runtime fixture 有個人喺門口; CP021B-R2 source search log
source_proposition: The located reference grammar documents location-first existential patterns, but that does not directly establish the parser's NP-before-locative-coda analysis.
implementation_effect: Keep this subtype explicitly unmapped and review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not use general existential or locative evidence as if it validated the exact order, span, or internal relation.

parser_claim: LocativePlacePhrase is an internal umbrella over event-location, locative-predicate, nominal-localizer, 喺度, and presentational-coda subtypes and requires narrowing or splitting before promotion.
source_proposition: The sources distinguish several constructions and semantic relations; no source treats the parser's entire inventory as one homogeneous construction.
implementation_effect: Preserve subtype distinctions in the evidence map and defer runtime promotion of the umbrella label.
forbidden_inference: Do not present LocativePlacePhrase as a standard Cantonese category validated wholesale by the literature.
